text:
15.4 The time in paragraph 15.3 may be extended by order of the court at the request of a party or on the court’s own initiative.


Security


16.1 HMCTS must take such measures as it thinks fit to ensure the security of information communicated or stored electronically. These may include requiring persons using the online case management system to follow security steps such as—


(a) entering an email address as their customer identification and/or password;


(b) providing personal information for identification purposes; and


(c) complying with any other security measures as may from time to time be required before using the online case management system.


Updated: Tuesday, 7 February 2023
